Figure 3 shows the optical absorption spectra for the
Cu2O-modified ZnO nanorods with different Cu2O de-
position times from 0 to 10 min. An absorption edge at
390 nm for the ZnO nanorods was observed, as shown
in Figure 3a. The absorption edges of the Cu2O-modi-
fied ZnO nanorods show an obvious redshift compared
with pure ZnO nanorods and exhibit a broad absorption
band in the UV region, which originates from the combin-
ational effect of the narrow bandgap of Cu2O (approxi-
